action: Measure generative-interface main-thread congestion with the Long Animation Frames API without confusing unsupported instrumentation with healthy performance.

progress.finding: Represent API unsupported, no observed long frame, observed long frame, and severe jank as distinct states; aggregate attribution and discard raw script identity.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic tests passed in isolated Node.js using byte-identical pre-commit files

handoff: Vercel Studio and Independent Creative Web should install the observer at runtime, preserve the unsupported state, and pair results with direct interaction tests. A clean observed window is not proof of universal smoothness.
